languages.original_text: "A collection of heresies assembled by another heresy... I have been to many places in my life, but this is the foulest corner of the galaxy I have ever had the misfortune of visiting."

languages.text: "Коллекция ереси, собранная иной ересью... я в многих местах бывал за свою жизнь, но в столь гнилом углу галактики оказываюсь впервые".
"A collection of heresies assembled by another heresy... I have been to many places in my life, but this is the foulest corner of the galaxy I have ever had the misfortune of visiting."
languages.original_text: "Коллекция ереси, собранная иной ересью... я в многих местах бывал за свою жизнь, но в столь гнилом углу галактики оказываюсь впервые".

"A collection of heresies assembled by another heresy... I have been to many places in my life, but this is the foulest corner of the galaxy I have ever had the misfortune of visiting."
"A collection of heresies assembled by another heresy... I have been to many places in my life, but this is the foulest corner of the galaxy I have ever had the misfortune of visiting."

languages.text: 「異端の集まりを異端が作った…人生で訪れた場所はたくさんあるが、この銀河で最も不浄な場所だ」
languages.original_text: "A collection of heresies assembled by another heresy... I have been to many places in my life, but this is the foulest corner of the galaxy I have ever had the misfortune of visiting."

traits.locale_text: 「異端の集まりを異端が作った…人生で訪れた場所はたくさんあるが、この銀河で最も不浄な場所だ」

languages.text: « Un assortiment d'hérésies rassemblées par une autre hérésie... J'ai beaucoup voyagé au cours de ma vie, mais je n'avais encore jamais eu le malheur de mettre les pieds dans un endroit aussi infâme. »
languages.original_text: "A collection of heresies assembled by another heresy... I have been to many places in my life, but this is the foulest corner of the galaxy I have ever had the misfortune of visiting."

traits.locale_text: « Un assortiment d'hérésies rassemblées par une autre hérésie... J'ai beaucoup voyagé au cours de ma vie, mais je n'avais encore jamais eu le malheur de mettre les pieds dans un endroit aussi infâme. »

languages.text: "Eine Kollektion von Ketzereien, gesammelt von einem Ketzer ... Ich war in meinem Leben schon an vielen Orten, aber das ist der widerlichste Winkel der Galaxie, den ich je zu besuchen das Pech hatte."
languages.original_text: "A collection of heresies assembled by another heresy... I have been to many places in my life, but this is the foulest corner of the galaxy I have ever had the misfortune of visiting."

traits.locale_text: "Eine Kollektion von Ketzereien, gesammelt von einem Ketzer ... Ich war in meinem Leben schon an vielen Orten, aber das ist der widerlichste Winkel der Galaxie, den ich je zu besuchen das Pech hatte."

languages.text: "Başka bir kâfirliğin bir araya getirdiği kâfirlikler koleksiyonu... Hayatımda pek çok yere gittim ama burası, galaksinin ziyaret etme talihsizliğine eriştiğim en iğrenç köşesi."
languages.original_text: "A collection of heresies assembled by another heresy... I have been to many places in my life, but this is the foulest corner of the galaxy I have ever had the misfortune of visiting."

traits.locale_text: "Başka bir kâfirliğin bir araya getirdiği kâfirlikler koleksiyonu... Hayatımda pek çok yere gittim ama burası, galaksinin ziyaret etme talihsizliğine eriştiğim en iğrenç köşesi."

languages.text: «Un surtido variado de herejías reunidas por otra herejía... He estado en muchos sitios a lo largo de mi vida, pero este es sin duda el rincón más abyecto de la galaxia que he tenido la desgracia de visitar».
languages.original_text: "A collection of heresies assembled by another heresy... I have been to many places in my life, but this is the foulest corner of the galaxy I have ever had the misfortune of visiting."

traits.locale_text: «Un surtido variado de herejías reunidas por otra herejía... He estado en muchos sitios a lo largo de mi vida, pero este es sin duda el rincón más abyecto de la galaxia que he tenido la desgracia de visitar».

languages.text: “由一个异端搜罗的诸多异端……我一生中去过许多地方，但这无疑是我不幸造访过的、银河中最污秽的角落。”
languages.original_text: "A collection of heresies assembled by another heresy... I have been to many places in my life, but this is the foulest corner of the galaxy I have ever had the misfortune of visiting."

traits.locale_text: “由一个异端搜罗的诸多异端……我一生中去过许多地方，但这无疑是我不幸造访过的、银河中最污秽的角落。”
